features: The Ram Natural Rubber 2L Litre Hot Water Bottle
description: Product Description The Ram Natural Rubber 2L Litre Hot Water Bottle Large 2L Hot Water Bottle Durable Soft fleece material Perfect For ACHES, CRAMPS, Pains Random Design Dispatched Indications Pain Directions Do not use boiling water. Always fill with hot tap water (maximum 40–50°C) to prevent scalding and damage to the bottle. Check for damage. Inspect the bottle and stopper for cracks or wear before each use. Do not overfill. Fill to a maximum of two-thirds full and expel excess air carefully before sealing. Use a cover. Always wrap the hot water bottle in a cloth or cover — never apply directly to skin to avoid burns. Keep away from infants and those unable to remove it themselves. Do not sit, lie, or put excessive pressure on it. Store empty and uncapped in a cool, dry place. Replace every 2–3 years or as recommended by the manufacturer. Do not use around children under 3 years of age Safety Warning Do not use boiling water.
